source_intake_record.raw_question_text: 一电路如图所示，$R_{1}=R_{2}=R_{3}=R_{4}=2 \Omega, R_{5}=3 \Omega, \mathscr{E}_{1}=12 \mathrm{~V}$ ， $R_{\mathrm{i}1}=1 \Omega, \mathscr{E}_{2}=8 \mathrm{~V}, R_{\mathrm{i}2}=1 \Omega, \mathscr{E}_{3}=9 \mathrm{~V}, R_{\mathrm{i}3}=1 \Omega$，求 $a, ~ b$ 两点间的电势差。
extraction_notes: images 字段仅包含 PIL 对象描述字符串，未提供可解析的图片路径或 URL

issues: metadata.image_paths contains PIL object description strings rather than usable image paths, as noted in metadata.extraction_notes

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says "如图所示", so the circuit topology is given by the image
the task asks for potential difference between a,b in a circuit, which depends on visual wiring/layout not fully specified in text
multi_step: the problem includes five external resistors and three sources with internal resistances, indicating nontrivial circuit combination/analysis
solving for the potential difference between a,b typically requires multiple reasoning steps such as identifying circuit structure and applying circuit laws
no answer choices are provided, so the solver likely must derive the result rather than recognize it
verifiability: answer_text is a concise numeric result with unit: "10 V"
answer_type=short_text, which is straightforward to compare after normalization
registry_passed=true and both question and answer are present in the registry record

risk_flags: circuit topology is image-dependent, so process verification is limited if the image interpretation is ambiguous
metadata.image_paths contains PIL object description strings rather than usable image paths, as noted in metadata.extraction_notes

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像均已存在，核心语义资产完整，能够支撑后续处理。
该题虽强依赖图像，但当前图像文件可用，且题干明确指向电路图，语义可恢复性较强。
答案为简洁数值结果，verifiability 较高，便于后续核验。
虽存在 metadata.image_paths 记录异常，但不影响已登记主图像资产的实际可用性。

normalization_record.normalized_question_text: 一电路如图所示，已知\(R_1=R_2=R_3=R_4=2\ \Omega\)，\(R_5=3\ \Omega\)，\(\mathscr{E}_1=12\ \mathrm{V}\)，\(R_{\mathrm{i}1}=1\ \Omega\)，\(\mathscr{E}_2=8\ \mathrm{V}\)，\(R_{\mathrm{i}2}=1\ \Omega\)，\(\mathscr{E}_3=9\ \mathrm{V}\)，\(R_{\mathrm{i}3}=1\ \Omega\)。求\(a,b\)两点间的电势差。
normalization_notes: 题干显式依赖电路图“如图所示”，保留为图像依赖题。
对公式与标点做了轻量规范化，未补充任何图中未明确给出的条件。
无选项信息，normalized_choice_map 保持为空。

candidate_problem_record.subject: 物理
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: 一电路如图所示，$R_{1}=R_{2}=R_{3}=R_{4}=2 \Omega, R_{5}=3 \Omega, \mathscr{E}_{1}=12 \mathrm{~V}$ ， $R_{\mathrm{i}1}=1 \Omega, \mathscr{E}_{2}=8 \mathrm{~V}, R_{\mathrm{i}2}=1 \Omega, \mathscr{E}_{3}=9 \mathrm{~V}, R_{\mathrm{i}3}=1 \Omega$，求 $a, ~ b$ 两点间的电势差。
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。

extraction_notes: images 字段仅包含 PIL 对象描述字符串，未提供可解析的图片路径或 URL
metadata.reasoning_chain:
电路在未连接 $c, ~ d$ 时为单回路电路，设回路电流为 $I$ ，取逆时针绕向，有
$$
I= rac{\mathscr{E}_{1}-\mathscr{E}_{2}}{R_{1}+R_{2}+R_{3}+R_{4}+R_{\mathrm{i}1}+R_{\mathrm{i}2}}=0.4 \mathrm{~A}
$$
$I>0$ 表明，电流的实际方向与设定方向一致。
根据一段含源电路的欧姆定律，从 $b$ 点出发逆时针绕至 $a$ 点，有
$$
V_{b}-I R_{3}+\mathscr{E}_{1}-I R_{\mathrm{i}1}-I R_{1}=V_{a}
$$
$a, ~ b$ 两点间的电势差为
$$
U_{ab}=V_{a}-V_{b}=\mathscr{E}_{1}-I\left(R_{\mathrm{i1}}+R_{1}+R_{3}ight)=10 \mathrm{~V}
$$

collection_decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像均已存在，核心语义资产完整，能够支撑后续处理。
